hero.subtitle: I build large-scale systems, lead engineering organizations, and drive AI transformation that delivers real business impact.

about.label: About
about.title: Execution-focused technology executive
about.p1: I have 20+ years of experience leading large-scale platforms and engineering organizations across fintech, e-commerce, and digital ecosystems. I have built and led distributed engineering teams of 50+ members, delivering cloud-native, microservices-based architectures that support millions of users.
about.p2: In recent years, I have led AI and LLM transformation initiatives — not as experiments, but as production systems that improve decision-making, automate operations, and enhance customer experience.
about.p3: I work closely with business and executive stakeholders to identify where technology can drive measurable impact, and oversee the full lifecycle from use case discovery to rollout.
about.p4: I combine deep technical expertise with a pragmatic, execution-focused approach to digital transformation.

responsibleai.label: Responsible AI
responsibleai.title: Building AI the right way
responsibleai.subtitle: When deploying production-grade AI systems, I put accuracy, privacy, and human oversight at the center. Not experiments — business impact.
responsibleai.project1_desc: Local LLM-based system analyzing high-volume financial documents. On-premise architecture ensured data privacy compliance; manual review effort and operational overhead reduced measurably.
responsibleai.project2_desc: Fraud detection system analyzing transaction data and textual signals using NLP and LLM. Identifies suspicious patterns beyond rule-based systems in real time. Designed for cross-domain scalability across fintech, e-commerce, and telecom.
responsibleai.p1_desc: No deployment without validated business impact. Every system is designed under real operational load.
responsibleai.p2_desc: Human-in-the-loop models are the default for critical decisions. Automation expands incrementally as trust is established.
responsibleai.p3_desc: On-premise model architecture for financial and sensitive data. Data never leaves the boundary — compliance is solved at the architecture level.

expertise.label: Expertise
expertise.title: Areas of expertise
expertise.ai_desc: Production-grade LLM systems — document intelligence, fraud detection, decision automation. Not experiments — real systems with measurable impact.
expertise.fintech_desc: POS, Virtual POS, digital wallets, AML systems, and financial compliance. Deep hands-on experience at CTO level.
expertise.cloud_desc: Microservices at scale on Azure and GCP. 100+ services deployed, supporting millions of concurrent users.
expertise.security_desc: HSM integrations (Thales, SafeNet), mTLS, PKI, blockchain custody. Enterprise-grade security architecture.
expertise.leadership_desc: Growing teams 3x, managing 50+ engineers across BE, FE, QA, DevOps. Agile at scale — Scrum, Kanban, OKRs.
expertise.digital_desc: E-commerce, media, betting, hospitality — turning legacy systems into modern, scalable digital platforms.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: If you want to talk about AI transformation, fintech, or high-scale platform engineering, send a message.
